# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_apimanagement (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_id` (String) API revision identifier. It must be unique in the current API Management service instance.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `resource_group` (String) The name of the resource group.
- `service_name` (String) The name of the API Management service.

### Optional

- `api_revision` (String) Describes the Revision of the Api. If no value is provided, default revision 1 is created
- `api_revision_description` (String) Description of the Api Revision.
- `api_type` (String) Type of Api to create. `http` creates a SOAP to REST API. `soap` creates a SOAP pass-through API.
- `api_version` (String) Indicates the Version identifier of the API if the API is versioned
- `api_version_description` (String) Description of the Api Version.
- `api_version_set` (String) Version set details
- `api_version_set_id` (String) A resource identifier for the related ApiVersionSet.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `authentication_settings` (String) Collection of authentication settings included into this API.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of the API.
- `display_name` (String) API Name to be displayed. It must be 1 to 300 characters long.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `format` (String) Format of the Content in which the API is getting imported.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `is_current` (Boolean) Indicates if API revision is current api revision.
- `path` (String) Relative URL uniquely identifying this API.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `protocols` (String) Describes on which protocols the operations in this API can be invoked.
- `service_url` (String) Absolute URL of the backend service implementing this API Cannot be more than 2000 characters long.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `source_api_id` (String) API identifier of the source API.
- `state` (String) State of the Api. Use `present` to create or update an Api and `absent` to delete it.
- `subscription_key_parameter_names` (String) Protocols over which API is made available.
- `subscription_required` (Boolean) Specifies whether an API or Product subscription is required for accessing the API.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) Type of API
- `value` (String) Content value when Importing an API.
- `wsdl_selector` (String) Criteria to limit import of WSDL to a subset of the document.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
